page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.e3.7xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance belonging to the ecs.e3 family. It is built on the x86_64 CPU architecture and runs on the KVM hypervisor. The instance features 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs, indicating a configuration with one thread per core and no hyperthreading. It is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core.

This instance type does not include bundled local NVMe SSD storage or integrated GPU hardware accelerators. All storage requirements must be met through network-attached block storage volumes. Additionally, the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

With its dedicated CPU allocation and high memory density, the ecs.e3.7xlarge offers a stable resource profile for memory-intensive workloads. The 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio makes it qualitatively cost-efficient for applications requiring significant memory capacity without the need for proportional scaling of compute cores. It is suitable for workloads such as in-memory databases, caching layers, enterprise resource planning systems, and memory-bound data processing tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.e3.7xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance from the ecs.e3 family, built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs with a single thread per core configuration, ensuring dedicated compute allocation. The instance is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying entirely on network-attached storage. This hardware profile is designed for memory-intensive workloads, such as in-memory databases, large-scale caching, and enterprise applications, offering a stable and predictable resource environment.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.e3.7xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 32 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs and 256 GB of RAM, designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads and in-memory databases.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server featuring dedicated x86_64 compute cores and a high memory-to-CPU ratio for demanding enterprise workloads.
